name: Textarea
description: A multi-line text input for longer form content.

props.name: inputId
props.description: Forwarded `id` applied to the native `<textarea>` element. Allows external `<label for="...">` to work.

props.name: size
props.description: Textarea size controlling padding, font size, and action sizing.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown when the textarea is empty.

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name, used in form submissions.

props.name: maxLength
props.description: Maximum character count. Enables the character counter when set.

props.name: resize
props.description: CSS resize behavior. Overridden to `'none'` when `autoResize` is enabled.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable interaction and apply dimmed styling.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Mark the textarea as invalid with error border styling.

props.name: readonly
props.description: Make the textarea read-only (focusable but not editable).

props.name: required
props.description: Mark the textarea as required for form validation.

props.name: clearable
props.description: Show a clear button when the textarea has a value.

props.name: loading
props.description: Show a loading spinner in the action area.

props.name: autoResize
props.description: Automatically grow the textarea height to fit content. Disables manual resizing.

events.name: kb-input
events.description: Value changed on input. Detail: `{ value: string }`.

events.name: kb-change
events.description: Value committed on change. Detail: `{ value: string }`.
